skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects self. ATK ▲ 70.01% for 10 sec.
skill1.note: Fires on every team Full Burst per hard rule 6 (fullBurstEnter, not burstCast).

skill1.kitLine: Activates when gaining a buff that increases sustained damage. Affects self.
skill1.note: Buff-gain entry triggers not simulated; folded into the user-selected `modes` system. Taste-entry timing (first qualifying buff gain, not t=0) is also unmodeled — taste effects are active from t=0 in the sim.

skill1.kitLine: Lingering Taste: Charge Speed ▼ 20% for 50 sec. This effect cannot be removed.
skill1.note: Engine clamps chargeSpeedPct ≥0 so a −20% buff would silently drop; modeled as permanent charge-time increase 60→72 frames (subtractive convention). Assumes she is always in a taste. 50s duration ≈ permanent at scope. ⚑ 72 (subtractive) vs 75 (divisive) unmeasured.
Mutual exclusivity enforced structurally by the mode gate (only one taste can be selected); the cancel event itself is not simulated.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when gaining a buff that increases distributed damage while not in a state of increased sustained damage. Affects self.
skill1.note: Same as sustained entry trigger — buff-gain events not simulated; folded into mode system. The 'while not in a state of increased sustained damage' priority gate is also unmodeled (mode is user-selected).

skill1.kitLine: Recommended Taste: Charge Speed ▼ 20% for 50 sec. This effect cannot be removed.
skill1.note: Identical mechanism to Lingering Taste charge-speed encoding — same charFixes value applies regardless of which taste is selected.
Mutual exclusivity enforced structurally by the mode gate.

skill2.kitLine: Activates after landing 3 Full Charge attack(s) while in Lingering Taste status. Affects the target. Damage Taken ▲ 10.2% for 5 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[0]: trigger hitCount count:3, mode sustained → enemy damageTakenPct 10.2, 5s
skill2.note: Team-wide amp (enemy-targeted damageTakenPct buffs every teammate's damage). hitCount:3 with hitsPerShot 1 = 3 full-charge shots. Mode-gated to sustained (Lingering Taste).

skill2.kitLine: Aftertaste: Deals 150.04% of final ATK as sustained damage every 1 sec for 5 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[0]: dot atkPct 150.04, durationSec 5, intervalSec 1, flavor sustained
skill2.note: Encoded as repeating-trigger DoT per kit-parse directive. Stacks per proc if 3 charges land <5s apart; at est. ~1.57s/shot the proc period ~4.7s ≈ dur 5 → mild overlap. ⚑ stack-vs-refresh depends on real cadence.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when hitting a target with Full Charge while in Recommended Taste status. Affects self. Attack Damage ▲ 60.01% for 5 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[1]: trigger shotFired, mode distributed → self attackDamagePct 60.01, 5s
skill2.note: Refreshes on every full-charge hit ≈ permanent while firing. Mode-gated to distributed (Recommended Taste).

skill2.kitLine: Activates when hitting a target with Full Charge while in Recommended Taste status. Affects all enemies. Deals 265.07% of final ATK as distributed damage.
skill2.where: skill2[2]: trigger shotFired, mode distributed → enemy flatDamage atkPct 265.07, flavor distributed
skill2.note: Full value vs single boss (engine default for distributed). ⚑ Whether this proc takes +50% FB bonus by landing timing is unverified.

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Attack Damage ▲ 60.19% for 10 sec.
burst.note: Unconditional (no taste gate). Own-burst block → burstCast trigger.

burst.kitLine: Activates when in Lingering Taste status. Affects self. Aftertaste Effect ▲ 349.8% for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[1]: trigger burstCast, mode sustained → self sustainedDamagePct 349.8, 10s
burst.note: Modeled as additive sustained-damage Damage-Up bucket (sim.ts:801). ⚑ A multiplicative DoT-magnitude reading would give ×7.20 vs the additive ×5.10 (~41% hotter) — unmeasured.

burst.kitLine: Activates when in Recommended Taste status. Affects self. ATK ▲ 70.09% for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[2]: trigger burstCast, mode distributed → self atkPct 70.09, 10s

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: which Taste is active is a user-selected mode (default sustained); buff-gain entry triggers not simulated; a team providing neither buff type leaves her tasteless (all taste-gated lines inert), which the sim cannot represent
documentedConfounds.why: Taste effects (charge-speed debuff + all taste-gated S2/burst lines) are active from t=0 in the sim. In reality they start at first qualifying buff gain. If the team provides the buff late or not at all, the sim over-credits. The tasteless state (all gated lines inert) is unrepresentable.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: Charge Speed ▼20% modeled as permanent 60→72 frames (subtractive convention); divisive would be 75 — unmeasured
documentedConfounds.why: 72 frames < 75 frames → if the real game uses divisive convention, the sim charges faster than reality → more shots → over-models. 3-frame difference ≈ 4% faster charge cycle.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Aftertaste DoT encoded as repeating per-3-full-charge instances that stack when procs land <5s apart — stack-vs-refresh and overlap depend on unmeasured charge cadence
documentedConfounds.why: If the real DoT refreshes (not stacks) on re-proc, the sim over-counts sustained damage by stacking overlapping instances. At est. ~4.7s proc period vs 5s duration, mild overlap is possible.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: 'Aftertaste Effect ▲349.8%' modeled as additive sustained-damage Damage-Up; multiplicative DoT-magnitude reading would be ~41% hotter during burst window — unmeasured
documentedConfounds.why: Additive: 60.19 + 349.8 = ×5.10 tick multiplier. Multiplicative: 1.6019 × 4.498 = ×7.20. If multiplicative is correct, the sim under-models burst-window DoT damage by ~41%.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1/skill2: full cadence tuple (chargeFrames 60, reloadFrames 141, 22-frame bolt gap vs autofire) is unmeasured datamine — ~15-20% shot-count swing
documentedConfounds.why: Direction unknown: if real cadence is faster (autofire, no bolt gap), sim under-counts shots (COLD); if slower, sim over-counts (HOT). The 22f bolt gap is assumed ON but unverified.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑ DISTRIBUTED-RIDER FB: verify the 265.07% proc takes +50% by landing timing (in-FB vs out-FB popup)
documentedConfounds.why: If the distributed rider does NOT receive the Full Burst +50% damage bonus in-game but the sim applies it by timing, the sim over-models the 265.07% rider during FB windows.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: the two taste-ENTRY trigger lines + two 'Cancels …' lines are in unmodeled.skill1 (4 entries)
documentedConfounds.why: Structural: mutual exclusivity is enforced by the mode gate; entry triggers are replaced by user mode selection. No damage direction — it's a control-flow gap, not a magnitude gap. The tasteless-state edge case is the only damage-relevant consequence (covered by caveat 1).

authorIntentSummary: Parser-baseline hypothesis (explicitly NOT validated). The author modeled Bready as a taste-mode machine: the mutually-exclusive Lingering/Recommended Taste states are a user-selected `modes` config (default sustained), with the Charge Speed ▼20% debuff encoded as charFixes.chargeFrames 72 (engine can't represent negative chargeSpeedPct). All taste-gated damage lines (S2 DoT + damage-taken amp in sustained; S2 attack-damage self-buff + distributed rider in distributed; burst's 349.8% sustained or 70.09% ATK) are mode-gated blocks. Key approximations: taste entry is from t=0 not first-buff-gain, the 349.8% Aftertaste Effect is additive (not multiplicative), DoT stacking behavior is unverified, and the entire SR cadence tuple is datamine-default. Every ⚑ is flagged unmeasured; the unit has zero board data and has never been fielded.
